race.description: The Thoroughbred Girls Gold Coast Stakes
race.comment: FELIX THE SCAT (11) was caught off the track under 60kgs and couldn't run on last Saturday over this distance at Eagle Farm. Drops a massive 8kgs today. Hasn't won for a while but he has a dash of quality and looks a nice gamble at odds. SIBAAQ (2) just missed two back over 2050m here then was a month between runs when beaten under a length in Piggyback's Parramatta Cup at Rosehill last time out. Yet to miss the frame in four runs at this trip. Serious contender. DEMON DARB (6) and QUOTHQUAN (8) ran one-two in open company over 1600m at Eagle Farm recently. Both come here as strong each-way hopes with light weights.
